alternate_names: Nikoo Homes 8 at Bhartiya Garden Enclave
recommended_public_title: Nikoo Homes 8 at Bhartiya Garden Enclave
legal_entity_note: For legal footer and ads, verify exact promoter/entity name from current Karnataka RERA certificate before publishing.
location_recommended: Bellahalli, near Thanisandra Main Road, North Bengaluru, Karnataka 560064
positioning_recommended: Garden-inspired residential community near Thanisandra Main Road with proximity to Bhartiya City and North Bengaluru’s tech, retail, education and airport corridors.
theme: Garden living / modern township with the heart of a wild retreat
tower_scale_recommended: Overall development commonly marketed as 6 towers / about 1010 homes; Phase 1 commonly marketed as 3 towers / about 500 homes.
possession_recommended: 2031 onward / RERA possession December 2031; target possession may be marketed as December 2030 by some partner sources.
price_strategy: Show “Starting from ₹93 lakh onwards” or gate detailed pricing behind Get Latest Cost Sheet CTA, because public/partner prices vary and inventory changes.
